description: 环境初始化完成：init.sh 可执行、进度文件存在、初始 commit 存在
steps: Verify init.sh exists and is executable
Verify initial commit is present in git log

description: Coding Agent 能读取 git log + progress file 了解当前状态
增量进度：Agent 一次只做一个 feature 并 commit
steps: Select next uncompleted feature from feature_list.json
